title: OSLU Manager on Duty Checklist
subtitle: AM & PM Shift Supervisors | Amenity & Building Management
purpose: The assigned Manager on Duty is responsible for ensuring all staff are in place and that the building is functioning as designed. The primary purpose of this role is to deliver A-class service at all hours of the day. This is achieved by continuously walking the building, proactively identifying action items, and implementing immediate resolutions. The MOD does not wait - every issue found is an issue resolved before the next step is taken.

items.label: Walk conducted through ALL amenity areas
Walk time logged on shift record
Action items identified during walk
ALL action items resolved immediately
Items needing follow-up - escalated to Property Manager
Items to watch - communicated to next shift supervisor
Gym is clean and free of trash/debris
All gym equipment is operational (no out-of-order)
Gym towels stocked at dispensers
Used/soiled gym towels cleared and removed
Mirrors clean, no visible damage to walls/fixtures
Furniture and equipment properly arranged
TVs and music operating at appropriate levels
Unauthorized users identified and removed
Pool water is clean, clear, and inviting
Pool deck is free of all trash and debris
Pool towels stocked at dispensers
Used/soiled pool towels cleared and removed
Pool deck furniture properly arranged
No damaged furniture or equipment on deck
Pool area free of unauthorized users
Unruly residents/guests addressed per policy
Pool signage visible and in good condition
Pool equipment (pumps, heaters, lights) operational
All lounge areas clean and professionally presented
Furniture arranged per property layout standard
No trash, debris, or stains on surfaces/floors
TVs and music operating correctly
Lighting functional and at correct level
Areas free of damage (walls, floors, fixtures)
Elevators and corridors inspected and clean
Amenity equipment (BBQ, billiards, etc.) operational
Unauthorized users identified and removed
Unruly residents/guests addressed immediately
All findings actioned immediately upon discovery
Maintenance work orders submitted for equipment issues
Property Manager notified of items requiring attention
Next shift supervisor briefed on all items to watch
Incident reports completed (if applicable)
Shift log fully updated before end of shift

footerNote: ALL FINDINGS MUST BE HANDLED IMMEDIATELY - Escalate to Property Manager as needed - Document findings and hand off to next shift supervisor
